approvedBy: Steve via Codex main session overnight approval
approvalSource: Steve approved the overnight Dev-Hub intelligence build, instructed Codex to keep going while parking blocked approval-bound work, then asked Codex to wrap up and pause with everything committed and pushed.
scopeSummary: Expose a read-only Dev Hub Auditor Promotion Boundary preflight that prepares the exact audit-finding promotion approval gate without running audits, writing reports, creating cards, mutating routes, or promoting findings.
constraints: Do not run audits or write audit reports from this preflight.
Do not promote findings, create backlog cards, approve/apply/reject/snooze/reroute routes, write Scoper/Portfolio/Current Sprint/approval records, or implement audit findings from this preflight.
Do not auto-promote Director, auditor, Scoper, Portfolio, or proposed-card recommendations into backlog, Scoper, sprint, or build work.
Do not run extraction, source sync, provider/model calls, login, Browserbase, paid/private source work, Harlan sends, or external writes.
Keep actual audit-finding promotion behind separate exact Steve approval with source report IDs, candidate finding/card IDs, classifications, and proof.
Fail proof if the preflight promotes, creates, mutates, runs, sends, writes externally, or presents a non-approval-required promotion contract.
